name: Attachment
description: Attachment schema from TM Forum API

allOf.description: Complements the description of an element (for instance a product) through video, pictures...

description.description: A narrative text describing the content of the attachment

url.description: Uniform Resource Locator, is a web page address (a subset of URI)

content.description: The actual contents of the attachment object, if embedded, encoded as base64

attachmentType.description: a business characterization of the purpose of the attachment, for example logo, instructionManual, contractCopy

mimeType.description: a technical characterization of the attachment content format using IETF Mime Types
